name: C. H. ROBINSON WORLDWIDE, INC.
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. is one of the largest global logistics providers, generating $16.2 billion in consolidated total revenues in 2025. The company provides freight transportation and logistics services including truckload, LTL, ocean, air, customs brokerage, and supply chain consulting. It connects 75,000 customers and 450,000 contract carriers via its proprietary Navisphere platform, managing approximately 37 million shipments annually. It also provides sourcing services for fresh produce through Robinson Fresh.

products.name: Navisphere
products.description: Proprietary technology platform connecting customers and contract carriers for freight management and visibility.

products.name: Lean AI
products.description: Proprietary AI and machine learning system applied at scale for dynamic costing, pricing, and logistics automation.

products.name: Robinson Fresh
products.description: Sourcing service for buying, selling, and marketing fresh fruits, vegetables, and perishable items globally.

products.name: C.H. Robinson Managed Solutions
products.description: 4PL services, 3PL managed transportation, and TMS technology from a single provider, launched November 2024.

products.name: Truckload Brokerage
products.description: Freight brokerage connecting shippers with contracted motor carriers for dry van, temperature-controlled, flatbed, and bulk capacity.

products.name: LTL Transportation
products.description: Less-than-truckload freight consolidation and brokerage services for single-pallet or larger shipments.

products.name: Ocean Freight
products.description: NVOCC and freight forwarder services including shipment consolidation, routing, and carrier selection for ocean freight.

products.name: Air Freight
products.description: Certified Indirect Air Carrier services providing door-to-door air shipment organization and forwarding.

products.name: Customs Brokerage
products.description: Licensed customs broker services assisting importers and exporters with regulatory and operational compliance requirements.

partnerships.description: Global Forwarding contracts with independent agents worldwide to extend its international logistics network.
